behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all the key files, the jsc:build:debug command, InspectorProtocolObjects.h, build:local, WEBKIT_LOCAL, WEBKIT_BUILD_TYPE concepts, jsc target, and ICU find_package requirements that the tests verify.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (cmake option, jsc target, find_package for ICU) without prescribing exact code edits or line changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral properties (cmake configures JSC, WEBKIT_BUILD_TYPE affects path, jsc dependency exists, ICU+WEBKIT_LOCAL+Linux logic) rather than specific variable names or line positions.
